notes: Phase 5 (Sunwell Plateau) Best in Slot from the Icy Veins TBC Classic Restoration Druid Healer gear guide — sourced from the original 2007-2008 Burning Crusade release (drafted ahead of the TBC Anniversary realm reaching this content, same approach as p3/p4). Enchants show the top-ranked pick per slot; the guide page lists further ranked alternatives. Gems are the general class/role recommendation from the guide's gemming section.

gems.name: Insightful Earthstorm Diamond — or Bracing Earthstorm Diamond (personal preference: mana regen vs raw healing)
Quick Lionseye (+4 spell healing / +4 haste) — occasional pick near a haste breakpoint, also unlocks the meta
Purified Shadowsong Amethyst (+4 spell healing / +6 spirit) — unlocks Insightful Earthstorm Diamond
